test.name: TC PRO 01 Them San Pham Moi Thanh Cong

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Nhập email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Di Den Quan Ly San Pham
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(.), '+ Thêm Sản phẩm Mới')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Monitor Samsung Curved Robot' into text field 'xpath=//input[@name='name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@name='category_id']' by label Máy ảnh.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@name='brand_id']' by label LG.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Màu' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Tên thông số (vd: Màu, Kích thước)'])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Tên thông số (vd: Màu, Kích thước)'])[1]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Đỏ' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Giá trị (vd: Đen, 5 inch)'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Tên thông số (vd: Màu, Kích thước)'])[2]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Độ dài' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Tên thông số (vd: Màu, Kích thước)'])[2]'.
kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Tên thông số (vd: Màu, Kích thước)'])[2]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '8 inch' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='Giá trị (vd: Đen, 5 inch)'])[2]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Thêm sản phẩm mới thành công!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.doc: Thêm sản phẩm mới với đầy đủ thông tin.

test.name: TC PRO 02 Cap Nhat Gia San Pham

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

Create Directory

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//tr[td[strong[text()='Phụ Kiện Robot']] and td[span[text()='0']]]'.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.doc: Sửa thương hiệu đầu tiên thành DELL.

test.name: TC BRA 03 Xoa Thuong Hieu Co So San Pham Bang 0

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Nhập email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Di Den Quan Ly Danh Muc
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(., 'Quản lý danh mục, thương hiệu')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(., 'Quản lý danh mục, thương hiệu')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(., 'Quản lý danh mục, thương hiệu')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: Quản lý Danh mục & Thương hiệu
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
